title.description: Igama lohlelo eliboniswa kwindawo ephezulu. Uhlelo lokufumana iiresiphi zeenkcubeko zokutya zehlabathi.

subtitle.text: Fumanisa iiresiphi ezivela kwiindawo ezahlukeneyo zehlabathi
subtitle.description: Isihloko esincinci esiboniswa phantsi kwegama lohlelo kwindawo ephezulu.

heroTitle.description: Isihloko esiphambili kwicandelo lehero ekhasini lasekhaya.

heroSubtitle.text: Khangela iiresiphi zangempela ezivela kwiikhitshi zehlabathi lonke
heroSubtitle.description: Umbhalo wesihloko esincinci oboniswa phantsi kwesihloko sehero ekhasini lasekhaya.

featuredTitle.description: Isihloko secandelo esiboniswa ngaphezulu kwegridi yekhadi leeresiphi.

cookingTime.description: Ilabheli lixesha lokupheka kwikhadi leeresiphi. {minutes} litshintshwa ngenani leminithi.

difficulty.description: Ilabheli eboniswa phambi komgangatho wobunzima kwikhadi leeresiphi.

easy.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi elula.

medium.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi enobunzima obuphakathi.

hard.description: Ilabheli yomgangatho wobunzima ebhekisela kuresiphi enzima.

label.description: Ilabheli efikelelelekayo yokutshintsha ulwimi kumphenduli wendawo ephezulu.
